'''varosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plagiogrammacean|plagiogrammacean]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plagiogrammacean|plagiogrammacean]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| varosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væresheth|væresheth]] || [[word:væreshej|væreshej]] || [[word:væreshesh|væreshesh]] || [[word:væreshe|væreshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:varoroshoth|varoroshoth]] || [[word:varoroshoj|varoroshoj]] || [[word:varoroshosh|varoroshosh]] || [[word:varorosho|varorosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:varoshoth|varoshoth]] || [[word:varoshoj|varoshoj]] || [[word:varoshosh|varoshosh]] || [[word:varosho|varosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:varofshoth|varofshoth]] || [[word:varofshoj|varofshoj]] || [[word:varofshosh|varofshosh]] || [[word:varofshof|varofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:varoshotho|varoshotho]] || [[word:varoshojo|varoshojo]] || [[word:varoshosho|varoshosho]] || [[word:varoshoko|varoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:varoshoth|varoshoth]] || [[word:varoshoj|varoshoj]] || [[word:varoshosh|varoshosh]] || [[word:varosho|varosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:varoshothol|varoshothol]] || [[word:varoshojol|varoshojol]] || [[word:varoshoshol|varoshoshol]] || [[word:varoshokol|varoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:varoshothotho|varoshothotho]] || [[word:varoshojojo|varoshojojo]] || [[word:varoshoshosho|varoshoshosho]] || [[word:varoshoko|varoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:varoshothon|varoshothon]] || [[word:varoshojon|varoshojon]] || [[word:varoshoshon|varoshoshon]] || [[word:varoshokon|varoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:varoshothoro|varoshothoro]] || [[word:varoshojoro|varoshojoro]] || [[word:varoshoshoro|varoshoshoro]] || [[word:varoshokoro|varoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
